monitor.title: OpenClaw Live Monitor
monitor.detectFailed: Monitor detection failed, click to configure manually
monitor.notInstalled: No local monitor detected, click to install/connect
monitor.error: Detection failed. You can still input URL manually.
monitor.missing: Star Office is not detected on this machine.
monitor.assistPromptInstalled: 已偵測到 Star Office 服務（{{url}}），請引導我連線並介紹可用的玩法。
monitor.installPrompt: 請安裝並啟動 Star Office 視覺化服務，完成後引導我連線。
monitor.diagnosePrompt: Star Office 連線出現問題，請幫我排查並修復。
monitor.visualDesc: Star Office is a visual companion for OpenClaw. It turns chat-side status into a live, interactive monitor view.
monitor.visualFallbackDesc: OpenClaw chat status becomes a visual office scene.
monitor.visualImageCaptionFallback: Preview image unavailable, open project for full screenshots.
monitor.hint: Input monitor URL manually, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:19000
